subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou art my hope and the ultimate goal of my aspirations. I beseech Thee, by the majesty of Thy divine sovereignty which hath encompassed all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب انت رجائی و غایه آمالی اسئلک بعزه قیومیتک التی احاطت الموجودات و سلطان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
